params.name: Essay on Manners
params.description:
On Dec 27, 1756 AD, Voltaire completed the Essay on the Manners of Nations.
It is one of the works of Enlightenment philosopher Voltaire. In this book, he explores the history and cultural customs of non-Western regions, as well as the national spirits behind them, in an environment where Western-centrism was rampant. He advanced Western recognition and understanding of other civilizations and played a significant role in breaking the shackles of pure faith and causing a change in Western tho …
